2606.23607.title: Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers
2606.23607.paper_summary: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .
2606.23607.paper_summary_zh: 線性模式連接（LMC）為理解和合併獨立訓練的神經網絡提供了一個有前景的基礎，但現有的方法通常僅從一個模型端點優化插值路徑，這限制了它們在大型預訓練Transformer上的可擴展性和有效性。我們提出了一個新穎且可擴展的框架，以實現基於LMC的模型合併，針對{\em 十億參數的預訓練Transformer}。我們的方法應用適當參數化的功能保持權重變換，以對齊功能上等效的解，並引入一個雙重學習程序，讓兩個模型共同學習其相應的變換，朝著共享的線性插值路徑進行。這種雙向優化顯著減少了插值障礙，並使大型架構之間的合併更加可靠。實證上，我們展示了我們的方法在中等大小參數的語言模型上，在WikiText上達到了近零損失障礙，這在我們的知識中代表了在這一規模上首次展示的近無障礙線性連接。在視覺領域，ViT-L在整個插值路徑上保持超過69\%的ImageNet top-1準確率，而現代的十億參數LLM僅顯示出小的損失障礙。這些結果表明，適當解決參數對稱性使大型預訓練Transformer能夠通過簡單的線性路徑連接和合併，並顯著改善插值性能。代碼：https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching。
2606.23607.author: Tianyi Li et.al.
